ConditionStableMessages: For once, my body is not arguing with me.
I can think clearly enough to make the next choice.
Steady hands. Steady breath. Keep it that way.
Nothing is fixed, but I am not falling apart yet.
A quiet minute is still worth something.
ConditionWornDownMessages: The miles are starting to sit in my bones.
Every small problem feels heavier than it should.
I need food, water, warmth, or luck. Any of them would do.
I can keep moving, but I can feel the cost.
This place is sanding me down a little at a time.
ConditionStressedMessages: Too many things are wrong at once.
My thoughts are moving faster than my hands.
I need to stop reacting and start choosing.
One mistake now will become three more.
I can feel panic waiting for an opening.
ConditionDesperateMessages: There is no room left for pride.
I need shelter, supplies, or a miracle.
Every sound feels like it is meant for me.
Survival has become a list of things I do not have.
I am making choices I would have judged yesterday.
ConditionNearCollapseMessages: My body is starting to make decisions without me.
The world keeps narrowing to the next breath.
If I stop now, I might not start again.
I can feel the edge under every step.
There is not enough left in me for another mistake.
ConditionBrokenMessages: I am not surviving now. I am delaying the end.
Everything hurts, and even fear feels tired.
This might be the last page I ever write.
The body gives warnings until it has none left.
I need help. I hate that I need help.
TraitCautiousMessages: Check the treeline before the road.
The obvious path is where people aim first.
Slow is alive. Fast is loud.
Leave before the place starts feeling safe.
TraitAngryMessages: Let the world push. I am still here.
I am tired of being hunted by hunger and noise.
Pain is another debt I will collect later.
If something wants me dead, it can stand in line.
TraitQuietMessages: Silence is the only thing that has not lied to me.
Do not speak unless the words can save you.
The world talks enough. I only need to listen.
A quiet survivor leaves fewer ghosts behind.
Stillness has kept me alive this long.
TraitPracticalMessages: Count what matters: food, water, exits, rounds.
A useful thing is worth more than a pretty one.
Do the ugly job before it becomes impossible.
Survival is just maintenance with consequences.
TraitResourcefulMessages: There is always something useful if I look twice.
Nothing is trash until I know what it can become.
Improvising is just planning with fewer choices.
The world is full of tools pretending to be junk.
TraitStubbornMessages: The road can take more from me, but not all of it.
I have outlasted worse minutes than this one.
Keep moving out of spite if nothing else.
I refuse to become another quiet shape in the grass.
FearDarknessMessages: The dark makes every sound grow teeth.
Night hides the distance between me and panic.
I hate how the black spaces feel occupied.
The dark does not chase. It waits.
I need light before my head starts inventing shapes.
FearInfectedCrowdsMessages: One infected is noise. A crowd is a sentence.
If they start screaming together, I run.
Crowds were dangerous before they were dead.
Too many bodies moving one way. That is how people vanish.
I can handle one. I cannot handle the sound of many.
FearStarvationMessages: Hunger makes honest people think like animals.
Empty is a sound inside the ribs.
I know what hunger can talk me into.
Food is not comfort anymore. It is permission to continue.
The thought of starving is worse than the ache itself.
FearBeingAloneMessages: No voices. No footsteps. Just me to blame.
Being alone makes the world feel already abandoned.
I keep listening for someone who is not coming.
Company is dangerous. Absence is worse.
The silence feels personal when nobody answers it.
FearSilenceMessages: Silence means something stopped making noise.
It is too quiet. Quiet has a reason.
When the world goes still, I start counting exits.
No birds. No wind. Nothing good starts like this.
The quiet feels like it is holding its breath.
HallucinationLowSanityMessages: Someone whispered my name. No one is here.
For a second, the trees looked like people watching the road.
I heard footsteps stop when I stopped.
I should not trust every thought that uses my voice.
HallucinationCannibalismMessages: My teeth remember something I wish they did not.
There are lines that do not grow back after crossing.
I can still taste the choice.
Some hunger is not in the stomach.
HallucinationNightMessages: The dark moved in the corner of my eye.
A shape became a person, then became nothing.
Night makes a liar out of distance.
I saw a light blink where there should be no light.
The black between the trees feels crowded.
HallucinationCorpseMessages: That corpse looked warmer a moment ago.
Dead faces all start asking the same question.
I thought I saw the hand move.
The body is still, but my head is not convinced.
Every corpse feels like a warning written badly.
MapToneChernarusMessages: Every village here feels like it locked its doors too late.
The coast teaches hunger, then the hills test memory.
Old roads, old farms, old ghosts.
The rain here makes every town feel abandoned twice.
MapToneLivoniaMessages: Livonia hides things under green leaves and military concrete.
The forest gives cover to everyone, friend or otherwise.
The south keeps secrets under its roots.
The bunkers are not the only things buried here.
MapToneNamalskMessages: Namalsk does not feel cold. It feels hungry.
The wind sounds like a warning nobody survived to translate.
MapToneSakhalMessages: Sakhal makes warmth feel like a memory.
The sea air cuts through everything.
Fishing villages, ice, and quiet mistakes.
The island keeps its dead cold.
Out here, shelter is more important than pride.
MapToneDeerIsleMessages: Deer Isle feels beautiful enough to be suspicious.
The coast smiles before it takes something.
The island has corners that do not feel finished.
Every landmark feels like it is hiding a story.
MapToneGenericMessages: This place has survived worse than me.
Every road leads to someone's last plan.
The land keeps its own records.
I should learn this place before it learns me.
No map shows where a person starts breaking.
